name: Maple & Rufus: The Water Robbery
short_description: Maple & Rufus: The Water Robbery is an escape room style game where you must solve multiple puzzles and riddles to uncover who is stealing water from the citizens of Pumpkin Hollow.
detailed_description:
Meet Maple and Rufus, the local detectives who are always eager to help the townsfolk in need. Lately, some citizens of Pumpkin Hollow have reported that their water supply is gone, and they suspect that someone is stealing it. It is now up to our detectives to figure out who stole the water, where it went, and what it was used for.

Maple & Rufus: The Water Robbery is a shorter point-and-click escape room game with multiple puzzles and riddles to solve. Both detectives have their own unique abilities that help them during their investigation. Maple has sharp eyes to catch things other animals might miss, while Rufus has a great sense of smell to uncover the most hidden secrets.
